examples: Each TRM id is a universally unique identifier (UUID).
TRM is a technology developed by Relatable, LLC as a unique bar code for digital media.
For example, the TRM for "Mellow My Man" by the Roots is f13069e3-da60-4782-82dd-a9f375e5c374.
The EA must also include a Technical Reference Model (TRM) and Standards Profile.
